metadata.description: Dolt/DoltHub version-control toolkit for Claude Code — a VC-surface skill, expert agents, and a wired dolt-mcp server. Ships the beads (bd) adapter today. Formerly beads-dolt.

plugins.name: dolt-mcp-vcs
plugins.description: Dolt/DoltHub version-control toolkit for Claude Code, via the dolthub/dolt-mcp server — a VC-surface skill + expert agents over a Dolt backend, with a verb-class mutation gate that keeps destructive ops recommend-only. Ships the beads (bd) task-tracker as use-case adapter #1. Formerly beads-dolt.
